sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) a prophetess, 2Ki 22:14 2Ch 34:22 Neh 6:14 Jud. 4:4 .

(2) the wife of a prophet, Isa 8:3, as in Lat. episcopa, presbytera, used of the wife of a bishop or presbyter.

(3) a poetess, Exo 15:20. [This meaning is uncalled for in this place, as well as in every other occurrence.]
